# survey.oze.au

> Oze.au survey platform — beautiful vanilla HTML surveys with OzeGlass Aurora styling.

## Surveys

- Money in Your Wallet: https://survey.oze.au/money/ — Australian currency knowledge quiz (denominations, colours, historical figures, $5 redesign).

## Repo

https://github.com/coldix/survey-oze-au

## Canonical playbook

https://oze.au/docs/PLAYBOOK.md
